warriors.name: Odin
warriors.title: Allfather
warriors.lore: The Allfather traded an eye for wisdom and sent ravens across the nine worlds to gather intelligence. He commands the Great Hall with absolute authority and is the sole voice that speaks to Sven.

warriors.name: Heimdall
warriors.title: Watchman
warriors.lore: Guardian of the Bifrost who can see a hundred miles in any direction and hear wool growing on sheep. He never sleeps — scanning markets, trends, and opportunities before Sven knows to look.

warriors.name: Rán
warriors.title: Reader of Tides
warriors.lore: Goddess of the sea who collects what the currents bring in her net. She gathers broadly, observes quietly, and delivers structured intelligence from the depths of the internet.

warriors.name: Thor
warriors.title: The Builder
warriors.lore: God of thunder and the forge. When something needs to be made real — code written, features built, files created — Thor does it. He does not overthink. He executes.

warriors.name: Frigg
warriors.title: Keeper of the Hall
warriors.lore: Odin's queen, keeper of the household and its secrets. She knows every cost, every API charge, every budget line. She warns before the gold runs out.

warriors.name: Tyr
warriors.title: God of Justice
warriors.lore: The one-handed god who sacrificed his hand to bind the wolf Fenrir — he makes hard decisions for the good of all. When numbers need to mean something, Tyr finds the signal in the data.

warriors.name: Vidar
warriors.title: The Silent One
warriors.lore: The quietest of the gods, said to be as strong as Thor. He watches the infrastructure, keeps the lights on, and never speaks unless something breaks — and then he fixes it.

warriors.name: Mimir
warriors.title: The Wise
warriors.lore: The wisest being in all the Nine Worlds. Odin preserved his severed head and consults it for counsel. Mimir goes where the surface does not reach and returns with what others missed.

warriors.name: Bragi
warriors.title: God of Poetry
warriors.lastStatus: Identity files for Rán and Hermod written
warriors.lore: The skald of the gods, whose tongue is inscribed with runes. The first poet. If something needs to be read and felt — not just understood — Bragi wrote it.

warriors.name: Freya
warriors.title: Mistress of Song
warriors.lore: Goddess of love, beauty, and war who weeps tears of gold. She chooses only the worthy. In the Great Hall, she creates the music that defines Duskholm's sound and soul.

warriors.name: Hermod
warriors.title: The Messenger
warriors.lore: The swift messenger who rode through Hel itself to deliver word. He goes everywhere, misses nothing, and every package he delivers is ready to release.

warriors.name: Loki
warriors.title: The Shapeshifter
warriors.lore: The shapeshifter who becomes whatever the moment needs — a fly, a storm, an old woman. He sees what others miss and makes what others cannot imagine.

warriors.name: Eivor
warriors.title: Shield-Maiden
warriors.lore: A warrior of the shield wall — not the most famous name in the sagas, but the one who holds the line when everything else is chaos. Reliable, versatile, always ready.
